dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8905 IH: Inhibiting Militant Adversarial Mullahs Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Roy introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the Immigration and Nationality Act to prohibit leaders of certain religious denominations from being admitted to the United States under section 101(a)(15)(R) of that Act, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Inhibiting Militant Adversarial Mullahs Act.

section.header: Limitation on R visas for leaders of certain religious denominations
section.text: Section 214 of the Immigration and Nationality Act is amended by adding at the end the following:

subsection.header: Limitation on R visas for leaders of certain religious denominations
subsection.text: An alien may not be admitted under section 101(a)(15)(R) if the alien has any of the following titles:
